title: lespedeza bicolor subsp. formosa
intro: Lespedeza bicolor subsp. formosa, also known as Formosa lespedeza, is a perennial legume native to East Asia, belonging to the genus Lespedeza and the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds that can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Lespedeza bicolor subsp. formosa include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Lespedeza bicolor subsp. formosa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
